name: Nature Picross
short_description: Nature Picross is a puzzle game where you use logic and deduction to create pictures themed around nature. Solve 100 satisfying pixel art puzzles, and continue playing with randomly generated puzzles.
detailed_description:
Nature Picross is a relaxing puzzle game where logic and deduction bring nature-themed pixel art to life. Solve 100 handcrafted puzzles, then keep the challenge going with endlessly generated puzzles.

This is my first game as an indie developer, inspired by my longtime love of picross puzzles.

Music and additional sound effect by Chris Lodgson.

These logic puzzles are also called griddlers, paint by numbers, hanjie, and nonograms.
